creator: olivier@gid0.org
text:
No, I'll keep maintaining this port !
The only problem was a typo in pkg-descr, I dont't have a @freebsd.org address.
Please assign it back to me and remove the lines after WWW in pkg-descr :)

Thanks

Olivier
